gwSpecs.description: The EclProfile CT+HP, a more powerful variant of the iconic PROLIGHTS LED ellipsoidals, boasting 400 Watts of fixture power, effectively doubling the lumen output and furtherly elevating color rendering while maintaining the same 6-colors LED sources. The LED source is controlled and calibrated by the advanced Spektra Os for unparalleled performance.

revision.text: Rev 037 - RAW photometrics updated - Control Channel updated as FW 1_1_02_0
